descriptionEn: To train students to observe objective objects through training, and to sculpture them through their own perceptions. In the process of practical practice, the concepts of contemporary art are instilled to cultivate the characteristics of personal artistic creation.
descriptionZh: 訓練學生透過對客觀物的觀察訓練，並透過自身的感受加以形塑。在實際練習的過程中灌輸當代藝術的概念，培養出個人藝術創作的特質。

descriptionEn: It is a course of reading stories, listening to stories, thinking about stories, and drawing stories. It includes the development contexts of comics in Japan, Continental Europe, the United States, etc., and a comprehensive discussion with literature, animation, and film; and through practice, visits, and industry exchanges, it allows this low-cost, high-vitality storytelling method to integrate into the system of personal creative development.
descriptionZh: 看故事、聽故事、想故事、畫故事的課程。囊括日本、歐陸、美國等漫畫發展脈絡，與文學、動畫、電影綜合討論；並透過練習、參訪與業界交流，讓這項低成本、高活力的說故事方式融入個人創意發展的系統中。

descriptionEn: Guided by industry needs, the course strengthens the cultivation of students' practical animation skills; establishing the foundation of character dynamic performance through repeated practice and correction; emphasizing movement stability and physical rationality, it cultivates precise and expressive animation production capabilities.
descriptionZh: 以產業需求為導向，強化學生實務動畫能力之培養，建立角色動態表現之基礎，透過反覆練習與修正，強調動作穩定性與物理合理性，培養精準且具表現力的動畫製作能力。

descriptionEn: Conducting imagination training and character design, deepening personality, interpersonal relationships, and worldviews to enhance story appeal, strengthening brand art strategies through color and visual processing, and exploring the benefits of combining characters and brands; through work presentations, industry judges conduct outcome evaluations and professional commentary, comprehensively cultivating cross-disciplinary integration capabilities from character creation to brand commercialization.
descriptionZh: 進行想像力訓練與角色造型設計，深化性格、人際關係與世界觀以提升故事感染力，透過色彩與視覺處理強化品牌美術策略，探討角色與品牌的結合效益。透過作品發表，由業界評審進行成果驗收與專業講評，全方位培養從角色創作到品牌商業化的跨領域整合能力。

descriptionEn: A course that integrates art theory and creation practice. Through the explanation and analysis of contemporary art history and theory, it guides students to accumulate knowledge as a foundation for creation, and establishes independent appreciation abilities through case introductions and exhibition visits. In practice, the course uses restrictive themes to inspire students to combine their own backgrounds and environments to conduct diverse deconstructions, and strengthens art and exhibition concepts through organizing exhibitions. Meanwhile, students extend theory to the observation of social phenomena and feed back the conclusions into creation. This course supplements the teaching direction from a creator's perspective, with the characteristics of teachers and students and the school's style jointly shaping the overall teaching appearance.
descriptionZh: 融合藝術理論與創作實務的課程。透過當代藝術史與理論的解說分析，引導學生將知識累積為創作基礎，並藉由實例介紹與展覽參觀建立獨立賞析能力。實務上，課程以限制性主題激發學生結合自身背景與環境進行多元解構，並透過舉辦展覽強化藝術與展演概念。同時，學生將理論延伸至社會現象觀察，將結論反饋於創作。本課程以創作者視角補充教學方向，由師生特質與學校風格共同形塑整體的教學面貌。

descriptionEn: Focusing primarily on design practice, supplemented by theory, the course centers on understanding and reflecting upon the relationship among technology, design, science, and art. In exploring the evolving role of design (and designers) under numerous important contemporary issues, students will open up different design themes from connections such as social, political, and natural-cultural environments. Therefore, this course encourages participating students to re-examine and challenge the traditional value of design serving users or audiences, and expects to progressively achieve the decolonization and diversification of design in the 21st century. By using several emerging trends of thought in communities such as communication, digital media, and interaction design in recent years as inspiration for workshop themes, students will practice "research-driven design" starting from a foundational level within team learning. In an interdisciplinary and transdisciplinary learning environment, students from different departments and cultural backgrounds will divide into small groups to conduct various types of design project creations and cultivate teamwork accomplishments under modes such as experimentation, fieldwork, and exhibition.
descriptionZh: 以設計實務為主、理論為輔，聚焦於認識與反思科技、設計、科學與藝術之間的關係。在探討設計（與設計師）於諸多重要當代議題下不斷演變的角色中，學生將從社會、政治與自然文化環境等連結上開拓不同設計主題。因此本課程鼓勵參與學生重新檢視與挑戰設計為使用者或觀眾服務的傳統價值，並期望在 21 世紀逐步實現設計的去殖民化和多樣化。藉由數種近年在傳達、數媒與互動設計等社群中新興的思潮作為工作坊主題靈感，學生們將於團隊學習中由基礎程度開始實踐「研究導向設計」。在界領域與跨科際的學習環境中，來自不同科系與文化背景的學生將分成小組在實驗、田野與展示等模式下進行各類型設計專題創作與培養團隊合作涵養。

descriptionEn: Providing students who are interested in interaction design with knowledge on the technological side and the foundation of programming; utilizing devices and multimedia content, combining technology to design interesting human-computer interaction experiences; starting from basic programming paradigms, becoming familiar with and mastering the control methods of various media content, and mastering computer input and interpretation of images and sounds in physical interaction design; combining various electronic components and integrating them with the control of multimedia content, giving students a good programming background for interaction design.
descriptionZh: 提供對互動設計有興趣的學生，在科技面的知識以及程式設計的基礎。運用裝置以及多媒體內容，結合科技設計出有趣的人機互動體驗。由基本的程式設計模式開始，熟悉掌握各種媒體內容的控制方法，在實體互動的設計上掌握電腦對於影像和聲音的輸入與判讀。結合各式電子元件，並與多媒體內容的控制整合，使學生對於互動設計有良好的程式背景。

descriptionEn: The goal lies in deconstructing and expounding the essence of creative media from different aspects, and completing the requirements of the graduation project through actual creations on different platforms. The complete expression of the project design concept will be strictly required. All completed works must be exhibited and performed at the degree show.
descriptionZh: 目標在於由不同面向解構並闡述創意媒體之本質，並藉由不同平台之實際創作以完成畢業製作之要求。專題設計概念之完整表達將被嚴格要求。所有完成之作品須於畢業展進行展演。

descriptionEn: Inviting domestic and foreign industries, experts, and scholars to hold practical lectures, to analyze and discuss industry content and future development aspirations. Discussing and analyzing based on the opportunities and challenges of students' future entrepreneurial development.
descriptionZh: 邀請國內外產業及專家學者舉辦實務講座，針對產業內容及未來發展志向作分析及討論。基於未來學生創業發展的機會與挑戰作探討與分析。

descriptionEn: In the era of digital transformation, how to find core insights and develop effective marketing planning is the focus of this course; through the sharing of practical cases and strategic experience, it allows both brands and lives to be precisely positioned.
descriptionZh: 在數位變革的年代，如何找到核心洞察，發展有效的行銷規劃是本課程的重點，藉由實務案例與策略經驗的分享，讓品牌跟人生都能精準到位。

descriptionEn: In the era of digital transformation, how to find core insights and develop effective marketing planning is the focus of this course; through the sharing of practical cases and strategic experience, it allows both brands and lives to be precisely positioned.
descriptionZh: 在數位變革的年代，如何找到核心洞察，發展有效的行銷規劃是本課程的重點，藉由實務案例與策略經驗的分享，讓品牌跟人生都能精準到位。

descriptionEn: Proposal writing teaching and strengthening presentation skills, teaching communication methods applied in business occasions to highlight personal charisma, how to utilize public relations and media experience to package oneself, dissecting actual cases to improve practical combat capability, and honing on-the-spot presentation capability through group and team interaction, etc.
descriptionZh: 提案撰寫教學及加強簡報技巧，教導試用在商業場合的溝通方式來突出個人魅力，如何利用公關媒體經驗來包裝自己，解剖實際案例來提高實戰力，以團體分組互動來磨鍊臨場發表力等。

descriptionEn: Cultivating students into foundational talents for the subsequent utilization of various message media, training students to understand the processes of various message channels and media interfaces, and enabling them to thoroughly understand the principles and related knowledge of this ecosystem. Letting students utilize thinking flexibly, making them understand the true aspect of essence.
descriptionZh: 培養學生為之後各種訊息媒介利用的基礎人才、訓練學生了解各種訊息管道與媒體介面的程序、使徹底了解此生態圈的原理及相關知識。讓學生活用思維，使其了解真正的本質面。

descriptionEn: It will revolve around how "creative media" becomes an effective communication language, and explore how to transform digital creation into concrete media forms. Through a large amount of practical exercises, students will conduct interactive dialogues with different objects, situations, and sites, thereby understanding the diverse approaches and methods of design. The course content will combine exhibition visits, case studies, as well as special lectures, aiming to provide a comprehensive learning experience that combines theory and practice, helping students to think deeply and practice their creative concepts in the field of digital media creation.
descriptionZh: 將圍繞「數位媒體」如何成為一種有效的傳達語言，並探索如何將數位創作轉化為具體的媒介形式。學生將透過大量的實際練習，與不同對象、情境和基地進行互動對話，從中理解設計的多元途徑與方法。課程內容將結合展覽參觀、案例研究以及專題講座，旨在提供理論與實踐相結合的全面學習體驗，幫助學生在數位媒體創作領域中深入思考並實踐其創意構想。

descriptionEn: It will cultivate students to have a correct cognition of academic research and be familiar with the rules of thesis writing, the content includes the interpretation of the research spirit, the introduction of research methods, and the teaching of thesis formatting.
descriptionZh: 將培育學生對學術研究有正確的認知，並熟悉論文寫作的法則，內容包括研究精神的闡釋、研究方法的介紹、論文格式的講授。

descriptionEn: Exploring how design follows the expansion trajectories of politics, economy, and culture; guiding students to re-recognize other possible forms of creation through the communication capabilities of design and mapping strategies.
descriptionZh: 探討設計如何追隨政治、經濟和文化的擴張軌跡。引導學生藉由設計與映射策略的交流能力，重新認識創作的其他可能形式。

descriptionEn: Exploring how design follows the expansion trajectories of politics, economy, and culture; guiding students to re-recognize other possible forms of creation through the communication capabilities of design and mapping strategies.
descriptionZh: 探討設計如何追隨政治、經濟和文化的擴張軌跡。引導學生藉由設計與映射策略的交流能力，重新認識創作的其他可能形式。

descriptionEn: Through course content that places equal emphasis on research and practice, students will learn the writing principles of interactive scripts across various fields, including video games, board games, and visual works.
descriptionZh: 藉由研究與實作並重的內容，認識互動式劇本包含：電子遊戲、桌遊、影像作品等諸多領域的編寫原則。

titleZh: 跨領域思考方式與創作工作營
descriptionEn: To promote international academic exchange and expand students' international horizons, we recruit well-known experts from the industry to teach in the form of workshops to enhance students' abilities in professional artwork production and presentation and strengthen their competitiveness.
descriptionZh: 為推動國際學術交流增加學生國際視野，延攬業界知名專家以工作營方式授課，增進學生專業作品製作與呈現能力，加強競爭力。

descriptionEn: To explore the mechanisms of cross disciplinary cooperation, and by using recent media cases of aesthetics and value, through screenings, comprehensive discussions, and literature readings, to understand three dimensions: First, as "works" of high creative imagination, their basic constituent elements, message expression, the uniqueness of their communication grammar, and their correlations and differences with other art/media forms; Second, as "commodities" of high economic value, the operation and control of their original planning concepts, distribution scale and layout, market marketing methods, and socio-cultural factors; Third, as mass media, their laws of expression and communication, aesthetic essence, image messages and reproduction, popular culture shaping, as well as collective consciousness shaping and other related issues. Thereby driving students to possess multi-dimensional and philosophical reflections, and to generate subversive perspectives when engaging in visual critical debate or creative practice.
descriptionZh: 探討跨域合作的機制，以近期具美學與價值的媒體案例，經由放映、綜合討論與資料研讀，來理解三個面向：它們作為高創意想像的「作品」，其基本構成元素、訊息表現、溝通語法的獨特性，及與其它藝術 / 媒介形式之間的關聯性與差異性；它們作為高經濟價值的「商品」，其原初企劃構思、發行規模與佈局、市場行銷手段、社會文化因素的掌控與運作；它們作為大眾媒介，其表現溝通法則、美學本質、影像訊息與複製、流行文化模塑，還有集體意識模塑等相關問題。從而推動學生從事視覺批評論辯或創意實作時，能具備多面向的、哲思性的省思，並產生顛覆性的透視。

descriptionEn: To strengthen students' observation of the application of story, logic, concept, and visual language in films through a precise and concise analytical approach. Furthermore, aims to enhance students' subltety and sensitivity when conducting various creative thinking or design execution, with increasing the depth and breadth of their works as the primary objective.
descriptionZh: 以精準簡潔的剖析方式來強化學生對於電影中故事、邏輯、概念、視覺語言的運用之觀察力。進而使學生在進行各種創意思考或設計執行時的細膩度與敏感度，以增加作品之深度與廣度為最大主旨。

descriptionEn: Utilizing existing "slow design" products and "slow design" concepts to introduce the design philosophy, methods, and guidelines of "slow design," and thereby inspiring students to apply them to the fields of innovative media design or animation image design.
descriptionZh: 利用現有的「慢設計」產品與「慢設計」概念介紹「慢設計」之設計哲學、方法與準則，並藉以啟發學生將其運用於創新媒體設計或動畫影像設計領域。

descriptionEn: Cultivating students into foundational talents for the subsequent utilization of various message media, training students to understand the processes of various message channels and media interfaces, and enabling them to thoroughly understand the ecosystem's, principles and related knowledge. Letting students utilize thinking flexibly, making them understand the true aspect of essence.
descriptionZh: 培養學生為之後各種訊息媒介利用的基礎人才、訓練學生了解各種訊息管道與媒體介面的程序、使徹底了解此生態圈的、原理及相關知識。讓學生活用思維，使其了解真正的本質面。

descriptionEn: The objective is to guide students to complete a complete interactive work.
descriptionZh: 目標在引導學生完成一件完整的互動作品。

descriptionEn: Focusing on digital technology, thinking about cultural changes brought by technology from fields such as gaming, smart living, and smart cities.
descriptionZh: 聚焦於數位技術，從遊戲、智慧生活與智慧城市等領域思考技術帶來的文化變遷。

descriptionEn: Relational aesthetics, also known as relational art, is a mode or trend presented in art practice, which was first discovered and proposed by French art critic Nicolas Bourriaud; Bourriaud believes that relational aesthetics is not an independent private space, but an art practice mode developed theoretically or practically from the entirety of human relations and social contexts; at this time, artists should be viewed as the "catalyst" for presenting relational aesthetics, rather than the center of the entire art concept.
descriptionZh: 關係美學又被稱作關係藝術，是美術實踐上所呈現的一種模式或者趨勢，最早發現並提出者為法國藝術評論家尼可拉 · 布西歐。布希歐認為關係美學並非獨立的私人空間，而在理論或者實踐上從整體人類關係和社會背景發展的藝術實踐模式。這時藝術家應當被視為呈現關係美學的「催化劑」，而非整個藝術概念的中心。

descriptionEn: Sharing practical professional experience of industry experts to cultivate students' practical capability for project research.
descriptionZh: 以業師專業實務經驗分享，培育學生專題研究實務能力。

descriptionEn: Exploring how design follows the expansion trajectories of politics, economy, and culture; guiding students to re-recognize other possible forms of creation through the communication capabilities of design and mapping strategies.
descriptionZh: 探討設計如何追隨政治、經濟和文化的擴張軌跡。引導學生藉由設計與映射策略的交流能力，重新認識創作的其他可能形式。

descriptionEn: Exploring how design follows the expansion trajectories of politics, economy, and culture; guiding students to re-recognize other possible forms of creation through the communication capabilities of design and mapping strategies.
descriptionZh: 探討設計如何追隨政治、經濟和文化的擴張軌跡。引導學生藉由設計與映射策略的交流能力，重新認識創作的其他可能形式。

descriptionEn: With the evolution of technology, the media forms carrying visual symbols have gone from the early cave images, paintings, and photography, to the audio-visual dynamic cinema, television, and animation, and then to the recent digital technology-driven computer multimedia, virtual interactive networks, and so on; each of their leap-forward mutations has repeatedly impacted human cognitive experience, and also subverted the rules of encoding/decoding in message communication. In response to this transformation, diachronically examining classic treatises related to visual composition and media forms in the fields of modern sociology, economics, art aesthetics, anthropology, and cultural studies to debate: the aesthetic characteristics constituted by various visual media and their rules of message communication, as well as the issues they involve in the process of message communication regarding reality/virtual reality/hyperreality, and also the molding of collective value consciousness and the construction of cultural experience. The purpose lies in enabling students to possess multi-faceted, philosophical reflection and generate subverted perspective when engaging in visual experience critical debate or creative implementation.
descriptionZh: 隨著科技的演進，載負視覺符號的媒介形式，由早先的洞穴圖像、繪畫，攝影，到影音動態的電影、電視、動畫，再到近期數位技術驅動的電腦多媒體、虛擬互動網路等等，其次躍進式的突變，再再的衝擊了人類的認知體驗，也顛覆了訊息傳達的製碼 / 解碼的格律。針對這個轉變，歷時性的檢視近代社會學、經濟學、藝術美學、人類學、與文化研究等領域，有關視覺構成與媒介形式的經典論著來思辯：各種視覺媒介構成的美學特質、與其訊息傳達的法則，以及它們在訊息傳達過程中，涉及的真實 / 虛擬真實 / 超真實，還有集體價值意識的模塑、文化體驗建構等方面的議題。目的在於，讓學生在從事視覺經驗批評論辯，或創意實作時，能具備多面向的、哲思性的省思，並產生顛覆性的透視。

descriptionEn: To help students construct the energy of cross-disciplinary media applications such as image, graphic, technology, art, and digital, so that they can become talents of independent, free, and diverse audio-visual creation.
descriptionZh: 幫助學生建構影像、圖像、技術、藝術、數位等跨領域媒材應用的能量，使能成為獨立、自由、多元影音創作之人才。

descriptionEn: To help students construct the energy of cross-disciplinary media applications such as image, graphic, technology, art, and digital, so that they can become talents of independent, free, and diverse audio-visual creation.
descriptionZh: 幫助學生建構影像、圖像、技術、藝術、數位等跨領域媒材應用的能量，使能成為獨立、自由、多元影音創作之人才。

descriptionEn: Exploring how, in the contemporary information media society, images demonstrate their far-reaching influence and the cross-disciplinary convergence site of contemporary cultural disciplines. It does not stop at the material plane, but is a multi-dimensional symbol; it is not only read, but is also the production of discourse, and even the interface of how discourse is produced.
descriptionZh: 探討在當代資訊媒體社會裏，影像所展現其無遠弗屆的影響力，以及當代文化學科跨領域的匯聚所在。它不止於物質平面，更是多維度的象徵物；不僅被閱讀，也是論述的生產，甚至是論述如何被生產的介面。

descriptionEn: Helping students to re-touch themselves with a beginner's mindset and impulse, and through deeply researching and discussing designers, artists, styles, schools, and diverse creative fields that have a profound influence on themselves, analyzing their own moved feelings and the relevance to them. Through classroom crits and interaction, helping students train the textual and verbal statements of their cognition of their own works, as well as the documentation of the creative process, cultivating students' personal sensitivity to humanistic creation and multiple, composite perceptions of things, including different levels of reflection and interpretation such as intuitiveness and thoughtfulness, and establishing the foundation for future processes of creative thesis writing and work ideation, experimentation, stage completion, revision, re-experimentation, and re-adjustment.
descriptionZh: 幫助學生能以一個初學者的心態和衝動重新去觸摸自我，藉由對自己影響深遠的設計師、藝術家、風格、派別、多元創作領域加以深入研究探討，分析自身的感動與其關連性。透過課堂評圖與互動，幫助學生訓練對自我作品認知的文字與語言陳述，以及創作過程的紀錄，培養學生個人對人文創作的敏銳度以及對事物的多重、複合感受，包含直覺性與思考性等不同程度上的反省與詮釋，建立日後在創作論文寫作與作品發想、實驗、階段完成、修正、再實驗、再調整等過程之基礎。

descriptionEn: To help students understand international design market marketing mechanisms, and apply the discussion and research findings of practical cases to individual and team creation studio management environments. Through practical exercises, learn the skills of creative proposal making, project management structure, and process design.
descriptionZh: 幫助學生了解國際設計市場行銷機制，並以實際案例的探討與研究心得應用於個人與團隊創作的工作室管理環境之中。透過實際的演練學習創意提案的技巧，專案管理結構與流程設計。

descriptionEn: Through course content that places equal emphasis on research and practice, students will learn the writing principles of interactive scripts across various fields, including video games, board games, and visual works.
descriptionZh: 藉由研究與實作並重的內容，認識互動式劇本包含：電子遊戲、桌遊、影像作品等諸多領域的編寫原則。

descriptionEn: To understand digital product packaging planning and market marketing through the actual planning of digital products.
descriptionZh: 透過實際規劃數位產品來了解數位產品的包裝企劃與市場行銷。
